# Trading Signals

Live AI crypto trading signals for **Claude Code**, **OpenAI Codex**, and AI coding agents.

Production-grade signal API powered by advanced AI models. Automated verification tracks every signal against real market prices.

**FREE during beta.** Star this repo to support continued development.

## Why Use Trading Signals?

**Battle-tested in production** — not a toy or demo. These are real signals generated by a production trading platform, tracked and verified against live market data 24/7.

**What makes us different:**
- Every signal comes with a **full trade setup** — entry, stop-loss, take-profit, leverage, position size
- Every signal is **automatically verified** — you see exactly what happened (TP hit, SL hit, actual ROI)
- **Confidence scoring** — AI rates its own conviction 0-100, so you know signal strength
- **Multi-expert consensus** — signals only fire when multiple AI perspectives agree
- **15+ real-time data sources** — funding rates, order books, whale activity, on-chain data, macro news
- **Adaptive risk management** — the system adjusts behavior based on recent performance
- **Transparent track record** — public dashboard with historical hit rates, ROI, and per-coin stats

**What signals look like:**

| Field | Example |
|-------|---------|
| Coin | BTC |
| Direction | Bullish |
| Confidence | 87% |
| Entry | $68,450 |
| Stop-Loss | $67,200 |
| Take-Profit | $71,800 |
| Leverage | 3x |
| Risk/Reward | 2.7:1 |
| Type | momentum_shift |

**Signal types include:** funding anomalies, volume spikes, price breakouts, whale activity, liquidation cascades, momentum shifts, trend reversals, and more.

## Install

### Claude Code

```bash
npx skills add roman-rr/trading-signals
```

### Manual

```bash
# Claude Code
cp SKILL.md ~/.claude/skills/trading-signals/SKILL.md

# OpenAI Codex CLI
cp SKILL.md ~/.codex/skills/trading-signals/SKILL.md
```

## Quick Start

```bash
# 1. Register (one-time)
curl -X POST https://aelita.x70.ai/api/skill/register \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"name":"Your Name","email":"you@example.com","githubUrl":"https://github.com/you","purpose":"Portfolio tracker"}'

# 2. Get active signals
curl https://aelita.x70.ai/api/skill/signals?status=active \
  -H "X-Api-Key: ask_YOUR_KEY"

# 3. Check performance
curl https://aelita.x70.ai/api/skill/stats?days=30 \
  -H "X-Api-Key: ask_YOUR_KEY"
```

## API Endpoints

| Method | Path | Auth | Description |
|--------|------|------|-------------|
| POST | /api/skill/register | No | Register & get API key |
| GET | /api/skill/signals | API key | List signals (active/verified/all) |
| GET | /api/skill/signals/:id | API key | Single signal detail |
| GET | /api/skill/stats | API key | Performance statistics |

## What You Get

| Feature | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| Live signals | Bullish/bearish crypto signals with full trade setups |
| Entry / SL / TP | Exact price levels for every trade |
| Confidence | 0-100 AI conviction level per signal |
| Leverage | Suggested 1-10x leverage with position sizing |
| Verification | Every signal tracked against real market prices |
| ROI tracking | Leverage-adjusted profit/loss per signal |
| Performance stats | Hit rate, cumulative ROI, breakdown by direction |
| Multiple coins | BTC, ETH, SOL, and 20+ other crypto assets |

## Use Cases

- AI-powered portfolio rebalancing
- Trading bot signal integration
- Research and backtesting datasets
- Market sentiment analysis
- Risk management dashboards
- Automated trading execution

## Reliability

- **24/7 operation** — signals generated around the clock, verified automatically
- **Production infrastructure** — Docker-based deployment with health monitoring
- **Historical track record** — every signal since launch is verified and publicly visible
- **Adaptive risk control** — system adjusts leverage and confidence thresholds based on performance
- **No cherry-picking** — all signals, wins and losses, are tracked transparently
